title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This cheering is amazing... When you're the one
running, the crowd sounds completely different.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It feels like everyone's hopes and dreams are out here today. I get it now... This is what the Derby is all about!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A little bit. But I'm keeping myself in check.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Look at me, running in a race like the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I feel a bit out of my element, but that's not
going to slow me down.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Here, in the biggest race in Japan, I'm going to
show everybody my mind-blowing speed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know I will! Root real loud for me, okay?
